cards.title: Having children makes you smarter? Incredible, but true
cards.body: Recent studies show mothers and fathers have healthier, younger-looking brains than their non-parent peers. The mental and emotional gymnastics of parenting appear to strengthen cognitive function.

cards.title: I was worried kids would kill my creativity
cards.body: A parent discovers that raising children actually enhances rather than diminishes creative thinking. Everyday moments with kids reveal surprising inspiration and wonder.

cards.title: Mindfulness and compassion during gender transition
cards.body: Families navigating a child's gender transition can benefit from mindfulness practices and compassionate approaches. These tools help support both the child and family members through the process.

cards.title: Summer self-care for parents in recovery
cards.body: Summer disrupts routines and increases childcare demands, posing challenges for parents managing recovery. Planning ahead helps maintain wellness during the season.

cards.title: Sensory prom a 'perfect end' for school leavers
cards.body: A sensory-friendly prom provides an inclusive celebration for students with SEND, featuring lower volumes and quiet spaces. The event allows all young people to enjoy their final school milestone.
